notes:
## 2.8.2

## What's new

- **Widget bind dialog** — fixed the glitch where “Allow access to widget content” was bounced by Steady protection (dialog mentioned Steady). You can read and confirm it; Steady Home no longer drops out mid-prompt. (Android still requires this one-time allow — cannot be silently skipped.)
- **Widgets look right** — proper height sizing (no more squish), reorder + remove in Edit layout, gray + blocked taps when the app is resting.
- **Clock / date** — Home settings: show/hide clock & date, seconds, large/compact clock, full/short date; reorder in edit mode.
- **Parent remote** — **Forget phone** removes a linked kid from the dashboard list (does not factory-reset the device).

_Install on kid phones for widget fixes; refresh the parent site for Forget phone._
